attributes.additional_details: I feel Keir Starmer needs to call a immediate general election because he’s ruining this country with illegal immigration and also with this social media ban and I feel that he’s not the right prime Minister for the United Kingdom
attributes.background: I want Keir Starmer to resign or call a immediate general election

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
